note: Westchester County districts selected as demographic / socioeconomic peers of Port Chester-Rye UFSD (majority Hispanic/Latino, high ELL, high economically-disadvantaged, ~4k students). 'tier' groups closeness of match. 'slug'/'state' are the BoardDocs URL path (go.boarddocs.com/<state>/<slug>/Board.nsf). ALL slugs are UNVERIFIED best-guesses from the build environment (no network) — confirm each with `herald-scrape committees --state <state> --slug <slug>` before trusting a crawl. If a district is not on BoardDocs, list_committees will fail; record the real platform in 'note'.

targets.name: Mount Vernon City SD
targets.note: larger (~7.5k), high poverty, predominantly Black + growing Hispanic

targets.name: White Plains City SD
targets.note: ~7k, diverse but more mixed-income; partial peer

targets.name: Yonkers City SD
targets.note: big-city (~27k), high poverty; SES peer but scale-different
